questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Let $T_n$ be the number of all possible triangles formed by joining vertices of an $n-$ sided regular polygon. If $T_{n+1}-T_n=10$ then the value of $n$ is:
questions.solution:
As we know, $n$ sides polygon has ${ }^n C_3$ number of triangles
$\begin{aligned}
& { }^{n+1} C_3-{ }^n C_3=10 \\
& \Rightarrow \mathrm{n}(\mathrm{n}-1)=20 \\
& \Rightarrow \mathrm{n}^2-\mathrm{n}-20=0 \\
& \Rightarrow \mathrm{n}=-4,5
\end{aligned}$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.subject: Mathematics
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: The maximum number of regions in which 10 circles can divide a plane is
questions.solution:
Initially there is one plane When $\mathrm{C}_1$ is introduced: 1 part is increased When $\mathrm{C}_2$ is introduced: 2 part is increased When $\mathrm{C}_3$ is introduced: 4 part is increased When $\mathrm{C}_4$ is introduced: 8 part is increased
$\therefore$ Total number of parts $=1+1+2+4+8+16+\ldots . .=1+\frac{1\left(2^{10}-1\right)}{2-1}=1024$
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
